instructions: Check whether a semantic-scholar or google-scholar MCP server is configured before invoking the Python script.
Use the correct subcommand (search, advanced, author) based on the user's request.
Handle blocked responses by retrying once after a delay, then offering the MCP fallback — never retry in a loop.
Present search results as a candidate list and wait for the user to choose which papers to triage.
Never auto-triage — always require explicit user confirmation before passing a result to triage-paper.
